title: aws-kms: integration tests assert sig non-empty but don't verify the signature
description: Trigger: any test run with live AWS credentials. Tests prove KMS returned bytes but not that they form a valid signature over the test message. Public key DER is fetched but never used. A misconfigured KMS key returning garbage would pass. Fix: use fetched pub_der to verify returned signature against original message with a local verifier (p256 crate for ECDSA, rsa crate for RSA-PSS). Project CLAUDE.md requires tests to have an independent oracle.
